flashcards.definition: Interest calculated on principal plus all previously accumulated interest: A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt).
How often interest is calculated per year: annually (1), semi-annually (2), quarterly (4), monthly (12), daily (365).
The effective annual rate accounting for compounding — always ≥ APR for the same nominal rate.
Each interval after which interest is calculated and added to the balance.
The value of an investment at a specific future date, accounting for compound interest growth.
